name: create_new_skill
summary: Create a new prompt-side skill from a user request.
description: Use when the user asks the assistant to create, add, register, define, or author a reusable skill procedure for future tasks.
when_to_use: User asks to create a new skill.
User asks to add a reusable procedure.
User asks to register a skill for future use.
User asks to define a skill that should be available later.
when_not_to_use: User asks whether a skill would be useful.
User asks to execute an existing task directly.
User asks a question rather than giving an instruction to create a skill.

metadata_path.description: Path to the created skill metadata JSON file.

procedure_path.description: Path to the created skill procedure markdown file.

exclusions: Do not use for general questions about skills.
Do not use for normal coding tasks unless the user explicitly asks to create a reusable skill.
examples: Create a skill for reviewing Python files.
Add a new skill that explains SQL migrations.
Register a reusable procedure for writing release notes.
Define a skill for triaging failing tests.
